signup.leftPanelTitle: Your AI marketing team, ready on day one.
signup.leftPanelSubtitle: No more briefing agencies. No more blank page moments. MarketPilot thinks in your brand's voice and publishes while you sleep.

hero.subtitle: MarketPilot uses AI to generate on-brand content, automate scheduling, and grow your social presence — across every platform, all at once.

features.title: Everything you need to dominate social
features.subtitle: From brand intelligence to auto-replies, MarketPilot handles the full lifecycle of social media marketing.
features.feat1Desc: Upload brand assets, tone guides, and competitor intel. MarketPilot learns your brand DNA and keeps every post on-message.
features.feat2Desc: Specialized AI agents for copywriting, image generation, and campaign strategy. Each skill trained on marketing best practices.
features.feat3Desc: Plan, schedule, and publish across every platform from a single drag-and-drop calendar. Never miss a posting window.
features.feat4Desc: Connect Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram, and more. Publish simultaneously with platform-optimized formatting.
features.feat5Desc: Intelligent comment and DM responses that match your brand voice. Engage your audience 24/7 without lifting a finger.
features.feat6Desc: Track reach, engagement, and conversions per campaign. AI-driven insights surface what’s working and why.

steps.title: Up and running in minutes
steps.subtitle: Three steps from zero to a fully automated marketing engine.
steps.step1Desc: Set up a workspace for your brand. Connect social accounts and upload brand guidelines in minutes.
steps.step2Title: Train the AI on your brand
steps.step2Desc: Feed MarketPilot your tone of voice, visual identity, and target audience. The AI learns what makes your brand unique.
steps.step3Desc: Create campaigns with a single prompt. Review, refine, and schedule posts across all platforms at once.

cta.title: Ready to pilot your growth?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of marketers who use MarketPilot to save time and drive results.

social.title: Social Accounts
social.description: Connect your social media accounts to publish content
social.twitterDescription: Post tweets, threads, and engage with your audience
social.instagramDescription: Share photos, reels, and stories to your followers
social.facebookDescription: Publish posts, photos, and engage with your Facebook Page audience
social.tiktokDescription: Upload short videos and engage with trends

socialHelp.title: Connection Guide
socialHelp.subtitle: Step-by-step instructions for connecting each platform to MarketPilot.

instagram.title: Connect Instagram
instagram.desc: Instagram requires connecting via Facebook — this is how the system gets permission to publish content on your behalf.
instagram.prereq1: A Professional Instagram account (Business or Creator) — not a personal account
instagram.prereq2: A Facebook Page linked to your Instagram account
instagram.prereq3: A Facebook account that manages the Page
instagram.step1: Click "Connect now" below — you'll be redirected to a Facebook login page.
instagram.step2: Sign in with the Facebook account that manages your business Page.
instagram.step3: In the permissions dialog — approve all requested permissions (content publishing, page reading).
instagram.step4: Select the Facebook Page linked to your Instagram account.
instagram.step5: The system will automatically detect the Instagram Business account linked to the Page.
instagram.step6: You'll be redirected back to MarketPilot — the account will appear as connected.
instagram.switchTitle: How to switch to a Professional account?
instagram.switchDesc: Open Instagram app → Settings → Account → Switch to Professional account. Choose "Business" or "Creator". Then link to a Facebook Page: Settings → Account → Accounts Center → Add Facebook Page.

facebook.title: Connect Facebook
facebook.desc: Connect your Facebook Page to publish posts and photos directly from MarketPilot.
facebook.prereq1: A Facebook Page (not a personal profile)
facebook.prereq2: Admin or Editor role on the Page
facebook.step1: Click "Connect now" below — you'll be redirected to Facebook login.
facebook.step2: Approve all requested permissions (manage posts, read pages).
facebook.step3: Select the Page(s) you want MarketPilot to access.
facebook.step4: You'll be redirected back — the Page will appear as connected.

twitter.title: Connect X (Twitter)
twitter.desc: Connect your X account to post tweets directly from MarketPilot.
twitter.step1: Click "Connect now" below — you'll be redirected to X's authorization page.
twitter.step2: Authorize access — MarketPilot will get permission to post tweets on your behalf.
twitter.step3: You'll be redirected back — the account will appear as connected.

tiktok.title: Connect TikTok
tiktok.desc: Connect your TikTok account to publish videos directly from MarketPilot.
tiktok.prereq1: An active TikTok account with creator permissions
tiktok.step1: Click "Connect now" below — you'll be redirected to TikTok's authorization page.
tiktok.step2: Sign in with your TikTok account.
tiktok.step3: Approve permissions — MarketPilot will get access to upload videos.
tiktok.step4: You'll be redirected back — the account will appear as connected.
tiktok.note: TikTok only supports video publishing — images or text-only posts cannot be published.

calendar.title: Content Calendar
calendar.description: View and manage your scheduled posts

autoReply.title: Auto Replies
autoReply.description: Automatically respond to comments on your posts
autoReply.emptyDescription: Create rules to automatically respond to comments

skills.title: Skills Engine
skills.subtitle: Generate marketing assets from your brand intelligence. Each skill uses your full research context.
skills.creativeDesignerDesc: Generate on-brand visuals for any post using your brand's visual style, color palette, and character brief — powered by Nano Banana (Gemini image models).
skills.emailDesc: Write a full nurture email sequence — welcome, education, and conversion — tailored to your audience.
skills.videoCreatorDesc: Generate short-form vertical video ads (9:16, 15-40s) from your brand intelligence — AI scenes, on-brand overlay cards, and background music.
skills.calendarDesc: Auto-generate branded visuals, captions, and schedule them across your platforms — powered by your brand intelligence.
skills.campaignGoalPlaceholder: e.g. drive signups, product launch, build awareness
skills.toneOverridePlaceholder: e.g. more casual, more technical, more urgent
skills.toneHint: Leave blank to use your brand character brief
skills.timeRangeHint: Posts will be auto-scheduled based on your target audience's optimal activity times.

videoCreator.title: Video Creator
videoCreator.configureDesc: Generate a 9:16 vertical video ad from your brand intelligence. Veo 3.1 creates the scenes, we add your branded overlays and music.
videoCreator.frameworkHint: How the 30 seconds are structured. Problem → Aha → Proof → CTA is the strongest default for SaaS/product ads.
videoCreator.tonePlaceholder: leave blank to use brand voice
videoCreator.estimatedCost: Estimated cost ≈ $3–$5 per video (AI scene generation)

creativeDesigner.title: Creative Designer
creativeDesigner.subtitle: Generate on-brand visuals from your post copy using your brand intelligence.
creativeDesigner.contentAndPlatformDesc: Paste your post copy. The AI will create a matching visual using your brand's visual style and color palette.
creativeDesigner.postCopyPlaceholder: Paste the post caption or describe what the image should convey…
creativeDesigner.referenceImageHint: Upload an app screenshot, product photo, or brand asset — the AI will incorporate it into the generated image.
creativeDesigner.styleDirectionPlaceholder: e.g. 'show a person using a laptop in a modern office', 'abstract geometric pattern', 'outdoor lifestyle photography'
creativeDesigner.styleDirectionHint: Override or extend the brand visual style for this specific image.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: All generated assets and campaigns for this project
campaigns.noCampaignsDesc: Run a skill to generate your first campaign — social posts, email sequences, video scripts, or a content calendar.

campaignDetail.noAssets: No assets in this campaign yet.

projects.setupTime: Takes about 2 minutes to set up

intelligence.title: Brand Intelligence
intelligence.subtitle: AI-researched context that powers every skill, caption, and campaign.
intelligence.onboardingTitle: Start by running the AI analysis
intelligence.onboardingDescription: MarketPilot will research your brand, competitors, and target audience using Perplexity + Gemini — then generate a full intelligence brief. This takes about 30 seconds.
intelligence.uploadExamplesHint: Upload examples above, then click Synthesize Examples to generate your style brief.
intelligence.runAnalysisHint: Run the analysis above or manually write your {label} brief.
intelligence.synthesizeDescription: Analyzes all {count} example{plural} and generates a unified Voice & Style DNA brief
intelligence.descBrand: Positioning, promise, pillars, differentiators, voice & tone
intelligence.descProduct: Value proposition, features, use cases, proof points
intelligence.descAudience: Buyer personas, pain points, channels, objections
intelligence.descCompetitors: Competitive landscape, positioning gaps, market dynamics
intelligence.descCharacter: Brand personality, tone examples, content themes, hashtags
intelligence.descVisualStyle: Color direction, typography, imagery, composition guidance
intelligence.descExamples: Upload past successful posts, campaigns, and presentations — AI learns your voice and style patterns
intelligence.descFeatures: Confirmed product capabilities and platform type — keeps AI assets grounded in reality
intelligence.descSop: Standard operating procedure for the research & analysis workflow

compose.title: Create Post
compose.subtitle: Compose and publish content across your social platforms
